description: Analyze the messy solar panel production data to identify underperforming days. Calculate the average production excluding errors, flag days below the 80% threshold, and compute the total output and savings.

natural_language.prompt: You have CSV data from a home solar panel system with 30 days of production data. Some entries contain errors or missing values. Calculate the average daily production (excluding errors), flag any days producing less than 80% of average, calculate total monthly production, and estimate cost savings at $0.12 per kWh.
